message:
feat(signal): broaden signal dispatcher to support Windows via signal-hook

Widen all #[cfg(unix)] guards in the signal dispatcher to
#[cfg(any(unix, windows))], enabling the global signal dispatcher
thread, SignalSlot delivery infrastructure, and SignalStream to compile
and run on Windows. The signal-hook crate already supports a subset of
signals on Windows (SIGINT, SIGTERM, SIGBREAK), so no behavioral
changes are needed -- only the cfg gates were overly restrictive.

Update module-level documentation to reflect multi-platform support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
